name: Brown Rice & Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion and garlic in olive oil until soft and golden.
2. Stir in the rice and coat evenly with the oil.
3. Add the vegetable stock, salt, and turmeric; bring to a boil.
4. Simmer for about 40 minutes, or until the rice is tender and all liquid is absorbed.
5. While the rice cooks, prepare the vegetables: cut beans into small chunks and steam or boil in salted water until tender. Drain well.
6. Cool the cooked rice and vegetables; mix together with chopped bell pepper.
7. Stir in half of the mixed nuts and transfer to a serving bowl.
8. Sprinkle remaining nuts on top.
9. Serve with an oil and vinegar dressing if desired.
